AngleGap: 34 age discrimination facts page — statistics on ADEA, COVID-era case volumes (20,000+ in 2020), industry age demographics, and enforcement rates; but covers age discrimination only (one of several protected characteristics in hiring), lacks any assessment-based mitigation framework, and the COVID-era filing data (2020) is now 5+ years stale.
Asset: Hiring Bias Statistics Hub: Facts, Case Data, and Assessment-Based Mitigation Strategies Across 5 Protected Characteristics (Age, Race, Gender, Disability, Background)
DistinctAngle: Expands from one protected characteristic to five, updates the enforcement and case-filing data, and adds an assessment-based bias-mitigation section (which structured assessments reduce adverse impact and why) — a skills-assessment angle this statistics-only page never touches.
